Suppressed Messages (Warnings, hints, broken links)

Finnish CodeServer terminology is not exposed to FHIR terminology ecosystem.

  • %A definition for CodeSystem 'urn:oid:1.2.246.% (330 uses)
  • %No definition could be found for URL value 'urn:oid:1.2.246.% (2 uses)

Finnish medication terminology is not exposed to FHIR terminology ecosystem.

  • A definition for CodeSystem 'https://vnr.fi/' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated (8 uses)

ICD-11 is still an external code system, right?

  • A definition for CodeSystem 'http://id.who.int/icd/release/11/mms' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated (3 uses)

It seems the valueset is available in HL7 Europe's terminology server (https://tx.hl7europe.eu/r4/ValueSet/eHDSISubstance-8.1.0), but the international term server is not able to identify the code set. The code set is indicated correctly, right?

  • A definition for CodeSystem 'https://spor.ema.europa.eu/v2/SubstanceDefinition' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated (8 uses)

Not sure why the QA report lists these for each of the entries in each of the sections of the Bundle and the Composition. For instance, in promlems section the only requirement for entries is that the reference SHALL be to an IPS Condition. The entries explicitly state that they comply with that profile. This is probably linked to https://chat.fhir.org/#narrow/channel/179252-IG-creation/topic/Obligations.20extension.20does.20not.20meet.20slice/near/538718762.

  • This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.eu/fhir/eps/StructureDefinition/composition-eu-eps|1.0.0-ci-build (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) (93 uses)
  • This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Composition-uv-ips|2.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) (136 uses)

The EPS specification is not yet published to the package registry.

  • A definition could not be found for Canonical URL 'https://hl7.eu/fhir/eps/xtehr' (2 uses)

The ICPC code systems are defined elsewhere and are not exposed to the FHIR terminology ecosystem

  • A definition for CodeSystem 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icpc-1' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated (3 uses)
  • A definition for CodeSystem 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icpc-2' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated (3 uses)
  • A definition for CodeSystem 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/ICPC-3' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated (3 uses)

The profile sets obliagtions for .effectiveDateTime (a Creator (IPS) SHOULD be able-to-populate), but we think a Period is more applicable for the way medication statement is used here.

  • This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/MedicationStatement-uv-ips|2.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) (6 uses)

The profile sets obliagtions for .timingDateTime (a Creator (IPS) SHOULD be able-to-populate), but we think a Period is more applicable for the way device use statement is used here.

  • This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/DeviceUseStatement-uv-ips|2.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) (10 uses)

The resource does not specify any allergens from the recommended value set as the only reason for the resource is to document that there are no medication allergies.

  • None of the codings provided are in the value set 'eHDSI Allergen No Drug' (http://terminology.ehdsi.eu/ValueSet/eHDSIAllergenNoDrug|0.2.0) specified in an additional binding, and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = http://snomed.info/sct#716186003) (2 uses)

The valueset referred to by IPS uses an obsolete code, and should be updated. See https://chat-archive.fhir.org/stream/179202-terminology/topic/FHIR.20ValueSet.20.22broken.22.20by.20SNOMED.20concept.20retirement.html

  • None of the codings provided are in the value set 'SNOMED CT Form Codes' (http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/medication-form-codes|4.0.1), and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = http://snomed.info/sct#385055001, http://standardterms.edqm.eu#10219000) (6 uses)
  • None of the codings provided are in the value set 'SNOMED CT Form Codes' (http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/medication-form-codes|4.0.1), and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = http://standardterms.edqm.eu#11201000, http://snomed.info/sct#385219001) (2 uses)

These code systems were in draft mode for FHIR R4. Not sure why v3-ActReason is so old, though...

  • Reference to draft CodeSystem http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ActReason|2018-08-12 (75 uses)

These four codes (B -EryBla, Pt-GFReEPI, P -TrAika, P -TT-SPA) for five (5) lab observations are apparently mistyped Kuntaliitto codes. We do include the proper code in the resource too, and keep this one for full transparency.

  • A definition for CodeSystem 'https://fimlab.fi/' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated (15 uses)

These warnings are for lab results, reported by the Vital Signs Profile. They indeed should not match.

  • This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.eu/fhir/eps/StructureDefinition/bundle-eu-eps|1.0.0-ci-build (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) (50 uses)

This code set is for medication allergies only, right? The EPS IG could be improved, it could check the category of the resource and recommend the additional binding based on that?

  • None of the codings provided are in the value set 'WHO ATC - IPS' (http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/ValueSet/whoatc-uv-ips|2.0.0) specified in an additional binding, and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = http://snomed.info/sct#13577000, http://snomed.info/sct#91934008) (2 uses)
  • None of the codings provided are in the value set 'WHO ATC - IPS' (http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/ValueSet/whoatc-uv-ips|2.0.0) specified in an additional binding, and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = http://snomed.info/sct#256259004, http://snomed.info/sct#256262001) (2 uses)
  • None of the codings provided are in the value set 'WHO ATC - IPS' (http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/ValueSet/whoatc-uv-ips|2.0.0) specified in an additional binding, and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = http://snomed.info/sct#716186003) (2 uses)
  • None of the codings provided are in the value set 'WHO ATC - IPS' (http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/ValueSet/whoatc-uv-ips|2.0.0) specified in an additional binding, and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = http://snomed.info/sct#735215001, http://snomed.info/sct#860604008) (2 uses)

This code system is used in FHIR R4, although it is still a draft version. See https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/consent-definitions.html#Consent.provision.purpose, https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/v3/PurposeOfUse/vs.html, and https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/v3/ActReason/cs.html.

  • Reference to draft CodeSystem http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/consentaction|4.0.1 (20 uses)

This is an external url (GDPR legislation), included in the Consent resource, not meant to be part of FHIR intrastructure.

  • %Can't find 'https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2016/679/oj' in the bundle (Bundle.entry% (3 uses)
  • No definition could be found for URL value 'https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2016/679/oj' (6 uses)

This is an external url (advance directives specification), included in the Consent resource, not meant to be part of FHIR intrastructure.

  • %Can't find 'https://sumut.fi/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/Hoitotahto.pdf' in the bundle (Bundle.entry[% (1 uses)
  • No definition could be found for URL value 'https://sumut.fi/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/Hoitotahto.pdf' (2 uses)

This is intentional. The Patient resource does not have the Finnish security label set. The Patient resource does have other meta.security elements, which prompts this note.

  • This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile https://hl7.fi/fhir/finnish-base-profiles/StructureDefinition/fi-base-patient|2.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) (2 uses)

This is intentionally an external URL. There is a packaged version within the Patient resource too.

  • Can't find 'https://www.mikaelrinnetmaki.fi/MikaelRinnetmaki.jpg' in the bundle (Bundle.entry[1].resource.photo[1].url) (1 uses)

This is not a published system, but does indicate the name space for the identifier

  • No definition could be found for URL value 'https://sensotrend.com/ig/ips/' (4 uses)

This is the code system the MedicationStatement R4 recommends for category, alhtough it is a draft version. R5 replaces this with http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/medicationrequest-admin-location and also allows for multiple entries in category, but R4 does not. So let's stick with this.

  • Reference to draft CodeSystem http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/medication-statement-category|4.0.1 (6 uses)
  • Reference to draft CodeSystem http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/medicationrequest-course-of-therapy|4.0.1 (8 uses)

This warning is for the Provenance resource, which indeed is not profiled in any way in IPS Bundle profile. We still want to include the provenance information with the bundle.

  • This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Bundle-uv-ips|2.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) (39 uses)

We do pin canonicals automatically

  • %Pinned the version of http://hl7.eu/fhir/base/StructureDefinition/% (10 uses)
  • %Pinned the version of http://hl7.eu/fhir/eps/StructureDefinition/% (32 uses)
  • %Pinned the version of http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/% (18 uses)
  • %Pinned the version of http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/CapabilityStatement/% (1 uses)
  • %Pinned the version of http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/OperationDefinition/% (2 uses)

We do use the more recent code 14747002 too (see discussion in https://confluence.ihtsdotools.org/display/FHIR/Immunization).

  • The concept '281657000' has a status of inactive and its use should be reviewed (21 uses)

We use this experimental code system, but not alone, rather complement it with other codings.
